summary: SPK RC 30 sua thumbnail DSM: ffmpeg Synology tat image2 van tao duoc JPEG that cho NAS import/poster.
changes: Thumbnail NAS va poster asset/project gio tu dong retry bang muxer mjpeg khi ffmpeg DSM cua Synology da tat image2/image2pipe, nen khong con roi ve placeholder tren man hinh import.
Giữ nguyen cache thumbnail .jpg va flow import hien tai, chi them fallback thong minh khi gap loi Unable to find a suitable output format tren DSM.
Bo sung regression test mo phong ffmpeg Synology tu choi image2 de khoa chat bug thumbnail tren ban SPK.
